text: Artificial intelligence, or AI, is a branch of computer science that aims to create machines capable of performing tasks that usually require human intelligence. One key part of AI is machine learning, where computers learn from data to improve their performance over time without being explicitly programmed. A more advanced subset is deep learning, which uses complex neural networks inspired by the human brain to process information. You likely encounter AI in daily life—for instance, when your email filters spam, when a streaming service recommends movies, or when a smartphone recognises your face. These applications make tasks faster and more convenient.
